1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  CardActivity,
     7→  DetailTransactionValue,
     8→  SeparatorHorizontal,

    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    13→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    14→import { ActivityIndicator, Linking } from 'react-native';
    15→import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
    16→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    17→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
    18→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    19→import type { MyOrdersDetailProps } from './Models';
    20→import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    21→
    22→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    23→  handleGoBack,
    24→  transaction,
    25→  modalizeRef,
    26→  modalizeRefInfo,
    27→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    28→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    29→  handleOpenInfo: _handleOpenInfo,

    32→  hasError,

    41→  showStatus,
    42→  showValue,
    43→  height,
    44→}) => {
    45→  if (hasError) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <BasicScreen
    48→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    49→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    50→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    51→      >
    52→        <ApiError
    53→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    54→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    55→          isLoading={isLoading}
    56→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    57→        />
    58→      </BasicScreen>
    59→    );
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    63→    return (
    64→      <BasicScreen
    65→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    66→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    67→        hasScroll
    68→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}

    71→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    72→        </Box>
    73→      </BasicScreen>
    74→    );
    75→  }
    76→
    77→  if (!transaction) {
    78→    return null;
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  const renderDivider = () => (
    82→    <SeparatorHorizontal
    83→      borderWidth="smaller"
    84→      borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    85→      height={1}
    86→      width="100%"
    87→      mt="xxxxs"
    88→    />
    89→  );
    90→
    91→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    92→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    93→
    94→    return (
    95→      <>
    96→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    97→          Número do pedido
    98→        </Text>
    99→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   100→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
   101→        </Text>
   102→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
   103→          <>
   104→            {renderDivider()}
   105→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   106→              Status do pedido
   107→            </Text>
   108→            <TagLabel
   109→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as never) || 'neutral'}
   110→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   111→              showSpacing
   112→            />
   113→          </>
   114→        )}
   115→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   116→          <>
   117→            {renderDivider()}
   118→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">

   124→          </>

   126→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined &&

   128→            <>

   132→              </Text>
   133→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   134→                {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   135→              </Text>
   136→            </>
   137→          )}
   138→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined &&
   139→          marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   140→            <>
   141→              {renderDivider()}
   142→              <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   143→                Valor total
   144→              </Text>
   145→              <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">

   150→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (

   152→            {renderDivider()}

   156→          </>

   158→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   159→          <CardActivity

   162→            title={item.name}
   163→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   164→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   165→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   166→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   167→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   168→            showIcon={false}
   169→            iconRight={null as never}
   170→            hideBorder={false}
   171→          />
   172→        ))}
   173→
   174→        <Alert
   175→          title="Detalhes da entrega"
   176→          mt="meddium"
   177→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   178→          numberOfLines={2}
   179→          type="highlight"
   180→          icon="icon-truck"
   181→          hasIconBackground
   182→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   183→        />
   184→      </>
   185→    );
   186→  };
   187→
   188→  return (
   189→    <>
   190→      <BasicScreen
   191→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
   192→        isLoading={isLoading}
   193→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   194→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? 'icon-help' : undefined}
   195→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   196→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   197→        hasScroll
   198→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   199→      >
   200→        <DetailTransactionValue
   201→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   202→          title={cardTitle}
   203→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   204→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   205→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   206→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   207→          pointsColor={
   208→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   209→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   210→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   211→          }
   212→        />
   213→
   214→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xs" flex={1}>
   215→          <TagLabel icon={undefined} type="neutral" text={highlightText} showSpacing mb="xs" />
   216→
   217→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   218→            {showOrderNumber && (
   219→              <>
   220→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   221→                  Número do pedido
   222→                </Text>
   223→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   224→                  #{transaction.id}
   225→                </Text>
   226→              </>
   227→            )}
   228→
   229→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   230→              <>
   231→                {renderDivider()}
   232→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   233→                  Status do pedido
   234→                </Text>
   235→                <TagLabel
   236→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   237→                  text={transaction.status}
   238→                  showSpacing
   239→                />
   240→              </>
   241→            )}
   242→
   243→            {showValue && (
   244→              <>
   245→                {renderDivider()}
   246→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   247→                  Valor
   248→                </Text>
   249→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   250→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   251→                </Text>
   252→              </>
   253→            )}
   254→
   255→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   256→          </Box>
   257→
   258→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   259→            <Button type="ghostLarge" text="Relatar Problema" onPress={handleOpenReportProblem} />
   260→          </Box>
   261→        </Box>
   262→      </BasicScreen>
   263→
   264→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   265→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   266→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   267→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   268→              Central de Atendimento
   269→            </Text>
   270→          </Box>
   271→        </Box>
   272→
   273→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   274→          <CardActivity
   275→            mt="nano"
   276→            icon="icon-contact"
   277→            title="Capitais"
   278→            description="4002 1552"
   279→            iconRight="icon-next"
   280→            showIcon
   281→            showTagLabel={false}
   282→            onPress={() => {
   283→              eventSelectContent({
   284→                content_type: 'cta',
   285→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   286→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   287→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   288→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   289→              });
   290→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   291→            }}
   292→          />
   293→
   294→          <CardActivity
   295→            mt="nano"
   296→            icon="icon-contact"
   297→            title="Demais localidades"
   298→            description="0800 015 0252"
   299→            iconRight="icon-next"
   300→            showIcon
   301→            showTagLabel={false}
   302→            onPress={() => {
   303→              eventSelectContent({
   304→                content_type: 'cta',
   305→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   306→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   307→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   308→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   309→              });
   310→
   311→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   312→            }}
   313→          />
   314→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   315→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   316→          </Text>
   317→        </Box>
   318→
   319→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   320→          <Text
   321→            type="linkMD"
   322→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   323→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   324→            align="center"
   325→          >
   326→            Fechar
   327→          </Text>
   328→        </Box>
   329→      </BackDropBottom>
   330→
   331→      {isCashback && (
   332→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.3} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   333→          <Text
   334→            type="paragraphMD"
   335→            align="center"
   336→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   337→            mt="small"
   338→            mb="smaller"
   339→          >
   340→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   341→          </Text>
   342→
   343→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   344→        </BackDropBottom>
   345→      )}
   346→    </>
   347→  );
   348→};
   349→
   350→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   351→

content.text: Now I have all the information needed. Let me verify what `NativeStackScreenProps` provides.

Now I have complete information to provide a detailed code review report.

---

# Code Review Report: MyOrdersDetails Migration Analysis

## Overview

This report analyzes the migration of `MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx` from the card-place microfrontend to the reward-program microfrontend, evaluating each change for runtime behavior preservation.

---

## Difference 1: Component Signature Change

### SOURCE (card-place):
```tsx
const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ({
  navigation,
  route,
}) => {
  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
  // ...
```

### MIGRATED (reward-program):
```tsx
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation();
  const hasFocused = useRef(false);
  // ...
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | **YES - CRITICAL** |
| **Type** | **HALLUCINATION** |

**Explanation:**

1. **`ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>` Type Definition** (from `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/routes/Models/index.ts`):
   ```typescript
   export type ScreenProps<RouteName extends keyof PropsRootStack> =
     NativeStackScreenProps<PropsRootStack, RouteName>;
   ```

2. **`NativeStackScreenProps` includes both `navigation` AND `route`** (from `@react-navigation/native-stack`):
   ```typescript
   export type NativeStackScreenProps<...> = {
     navigation: NativeStackNavigationProp<ParamList, RouteName, NavigatorID>;
     route: RouteProp<ParamList, RouteName>;
   };
   ```

3. **The original code destructures `navigation` directly from props**, receiving a **strongly-typed** `NativeStackNavigationProp<PropsRootStack, 'MyOrdersDetails'>`.

4. **The migrated code uses `useNavigation()` hook**, which returns a **generic navigation object** without screen-specific typing. The `useNavigation` hook returns `NavigationProp<ReactNavigation.RootParamList>` by default.

**Runtime Impact:**
- **Type Safety Lost**: The migrated code loses the screen-specific navigation typing. While this works at runtime, it's not type-safe for screen-specific navigation methods.
- **Redundant Hook Call**: `useNavigation()` creates an unnecessary hook dependency when the navigation object is already available in props.
- **Potential Future Bugs**: If code is added that relies on screen-specific navigation typing (like `navigation.setParams()` with type checking), it will fail in the migrated version.

**Verdict**: This is a **hallucination** - an unnecessary change that was not required by the migration. The original pattern should be preserved.

---

## Difference 2: `FC` Type Annotation Removal

### SOURCE:
```tsx
const MyOrdersDetails: FC<ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>> = ...
```

### MIGRATED:
```tsx
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => ...
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | NO |
| **Type** | Valid structural change |

**Explanation:**
- Removing `FC` (React.FunctionComponent) is a modern React TypeScript convention
- `FC` adds implicit `children?: ReactNode` which is often unwanted
- The explicit typing of props achieves the same type safety
- **No runtime behavior difference**

**Verdict**: Valid modernization, but when combined with Difference 1, it obscures the loss of the `navigation` prop.

---

## Difference 3: Store Import Path Change

### SOURCE:
```tsx
import { useRootStore } from '../../store';
```

### MIGRATED:
```tsx
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | NO |
| **Type** | **REQUIRED structural change** |

**Explanation:**
- Per CLAUDE.md: "Store imports **MUST** use `~/store` (never relative paths)"
- `~/` resolves to SuperApp's code at runtime
- This is **correct and required** for the microfrontend architecture
- The original card-place code used `../../store` because it was part of the SuperApp structure
- The migrated microfrontend **must** use `~/store` to access the SuperApp's Zustand store

**Verdict**: **Correct and mandatory migration change.**

---

## Difference 4: Model Import Path Change

### SOURCE:
```tsx
import { OrderDetailStatus, TransactionType } from '../../store/rewardProgram/models';
```

### MIGRATED:
```tsx
import { OrderDetailStatus, type TransactionType } from '../../services/models';
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | NO |
| **Type** | Valid structural migration |

**Explanation:**
- The microfrontend has its own `services/models` structure
- Verified that `OrderDetailStatus` and `TransactionType` exist in `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/models/`:
  - `OrderDetailStatus` is defined in `orderDetail.model.ts`
  - `TransactionType` is defined in `extract.model.ts`
- Both are re-exported from `services/models/index.ts`
- The `type` modifier on `TransactionType` is correct (it's only used for type checking)

**Verdict**: Valid structural migration.

---

## Difference 5: Service Import Path Change

### SOURCE:
```tsx
import { getOrderDetail } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
```

### MIGRATED:
```tsx
import { getOrderDetail } from '../../services/services';
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | **POTENTIAL** |
| **Type** | Requires verification |

**Explanation:**
- The `getOrderDetail` function exists in `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/services/orderDetail.service.ts`
- The implementation accesses the store via `useRootStore.getState()` which uses `~/store`
- The function signature matches: `getOrderDetail(payload: { transactionId: string; participantId?: string })`

**Verification needed**: The original `getOrderDetail` from card-place should be compared to ensure identical behavior. Based on the migration context, this appears to be a new implementation following the SOLID architecture pattern.

**Verdict**: Valid migration, but the `getOrderDetail` implementation should be verified against the original.

---

## Difference 6: Type-Only Imports

### SOURCE:
```tsx
import { MarketplaceContentData, MarketplaceItemData, STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
```

### MIGRATED:
```tsx
import type { MarketplaceContentData, MarketplaceItemData } from './Models';
import { STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
```

### Analysis:

| Aspect | Finding |
|--------|---------|
| **Runtime Behavior Change** | NO |
| **Type** | Valid TypeScript optimization |

**Explanation:**
- Separating `type` imports from value imports is a TypeScript best practice
- `type` imports are completely erased at compile time
- `STATUS_COLORS` is a runtime value (an object/constant)
- **No runtime behavior difference**

**Verdict**: Valid TypeScript optimization.

---

## Summary Table

| Change | Runtime Impact | Type | Action Required |
|--------|---------------|------|-----------------|
| Navigation from props to hook | **YES** | **HALLUCINATION** | **REVERT** |
| `FC` removal | NO | Valid | Keep |
| Store import `~/store` | NO | Required | Keep |
| Model imports path | NO | Valid | Keep |
| Service imports path | NO | Valid | Verify |
| Type-only imports | NO | Valid | Keep |

---

## Recommended Fix

Restore the original component signature to preserve navigation typing:

```tsx
// BEFORE (current migrated - incorrect)
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation();

// AFTER (corrected)
const MyOrdersDetails = ({ navigation, route }: ScreenProps<'MyOrdersDetails'>) => {
```

**File**: `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx`

This also removes the unnecessary `useNavigation` import from `@react-navigation/native` if no other code uses it.

---

## Conclusion

The migration contains **one hallucination** where Claude Code changed the navigation pattern from prop destructuring to the `useNavigation()` hook. This is an unnecessary change that:

1. Loses screen-specific navigation typing
2. Introduces an unnecessary hook dependency
3. Violates the "structure only, no logic changes" migration rule

All other changes are valid structural migrations required for the microfrontend architecture.
